description:
ICICI LOMBARD ELEVATE plan updated Review 2025
0:00 INTRODUCTION 
1:07 Updated Review 2025 elevate
2:25 Unlimited sum assured, infinite care, Power booster, Jumpstart, Restoration
3:58 Day care, Inpatient treatments, Modern treatments. Ambulance Basic cover
4:51 Add ons
8:35 Discounts CIBIL SCORE ETC
9:30 Entry age, Sum assured
9:58 Waiting periods
10: 44 Zone base Premium 
11:29 Premiums
The ICI CI Lombard Elevate Plan  is a comprehensive health insurance policy that offers extensive coverage, including some unique benefits introduced in 2025.

Key Features of the Elevate Plan (2025 Updates)  

1. Infinite Claim Amount– A major highlight of this plan is the "Infinite Care" add-on, which allows policyholders to claim unlimited medical expenses once in their lifetime, even if it exceeds the sum insured. However, this add-on must be purchased within the first two policy years and cannot be reinstated once used or removed during renewal.

2. PED Coverage from Day 30 – With the  JumpStart optional cover, pre-existing conditions like  diabetes, hypertension, asthma, and coronary artery disease are covered from just 30 days instead of the usual waiting period.

3. Unlimited Restoration of Sum Insured – If the sum insured is exhausted due to a claim, the coverage is restored 100% unlimited times within the policy year, ensuring continuous protection .

4. Inflation Protection – The sum insured increases at each renewal based on the previous year's inflation rate, helping policyholders keep up with rising medical costs.

5. Maternity Benefits – Covers prenatal, postnatal, and delivery expenses, including maternity complications .

6. Chronic Disease Management– Special support for pre-existing conditions like  obesity, hypertension, and diabetes, including diet counseling and annual health check-ups.

7. Additional Wellness Benefits
   - 30% Renewal Premium Discount  if you earn at least 9,000 wellness points.  
   - Annual Health Check-Up at network providers】.  
   - Teleconsultations with doctors (unlimited access).  

8. Personal Accident & Emergency Services  
   Personal Accident Cover for permanent disability or death.  
   Home Nursing Allowance for post-hospitalization care.  
  Domestic Air Ambulance cover for medical emergencies.  
  Compassionate Visit Coverage for an immediate family member if the insured is hospitalized for more than five days.  

9. Faster Waiting Periods – The plan now offers shorter waiting periods for maternity benefits, specific illnesses, and worldwide coverage (some reduced from 2 years to just 1 year).

Who Should Consider This Plan?  
The ICI CI Lombard Elevate Plan is ideal for individuals and families looking for  comprehensive coverage with no financial limits on medical claims. It is especially beneficial for those with chronic conditions, expecting mothers, and those seeking extensive hospitalization and wellness benefits.

For the latest details, you can refer to the official ICICI Lombard brochure: [ICICI Lombard Elevate Plan Brochure](https://www.icicilombard.com/docs/default-source/default-document-library/elevate-brochure_final_4-6-24.pdf.

comments.text: I have taken on September 24.. my daughter admitted on February 2025.  Got cashless treatment of 80000 .. but initially for cashless approval I need to fight for 12 hours..  everyone need to understand any company you choose when time claim or cashless you have to fight.... You need to be prepared for  fight.. and also be prepared with proper last hospitalization documents if available.  .. overall this plan is very good.. if you got your claim or cashless😂
comments.author: @deep2002baroda

comments.text:
Any insurance company, if you are claiming for the first time for any disease/disorder...they check all the parameters of PED and other non disclosure made by you (if any)... So this is not hectic...they do not deny approval...but they take time to admit this for future action.... Overall ICICI Lombard is good health insurance.... I am not saying others are bad... Rest are good...but my personal experience is it is good.... Later claims get pre-approved for hospitalisation ,if correct , within 15-20 minutes. I am personally using icici Lombard since 8 years ... And all my claims have been settled as per policy.

Now, i think This ELEVATE Plan is better than all others....with Unlimited Base Sum insured option...Category..... Anyone planning genuinely, then take it...

Their customer service is good.... At least you can talk with your concern.... 

Do not go for any Standalone insurers, most specifically CARE Health, you will fed up with them....Their Customer care is very very awful..means they connect only to Sales dept... Rest concen through email..which take 48 to reply.

I have shared my personal experience...Rest your choice
....

I have learned it through years of experience about this....

One thing, any insurance you go for check two parameters minimum:-

1) Claim incurred ratio

2) Claim settlement ratio

Even if claim settlement ratio is good, if Claim incurred ratio is not good...then don't take it.

Good claim incurred ratio -- b/w 70-80%...+- 3-4%
